description: Sub-cycle that converts patient-vs-caregiver tension into outward-projecting symbiosis. Runs inside every full Human Frontier Living Pulse loop. Reads multi-level input center to detect internal order/chaos before any grounding platform forms.
tetherPoints: auto-load on Pulse initialization via main architecture loader
hooks into GRA → Route → Connectivity → Recovery & Adaptive Balance phases
feeds raw input to Anchor, Lens, Paradox Rider, and Recovery Integrator
outputs to Legacy Guardian and Frontier Scout for outward projection

inputCenterRequirements.openNotesField: near-unlimited paragraph input (journal-style, raw or skewed)
inputCenterRequirements.internalOrderDetection: Lens + Anchor parse font chaos, paragraph structure, and narrative coherence on every submit to set starting ground truth

stages.name: Tension
stages.purpose: Registers power imbalance and raw friction without forcing resolution. Multi-level input center captures exact internal order level here.

stages.name: Understanding
stages.purpose: Patient and caregiver (or app echo) see the same paradox from both sides. Open notes become shared map material; internal order begins clarifying.

stages.name: Symbiosis
stages.purpose: Mutual reinforcement forms. Adapt_Improvise_Balance schema keeps it flexible. winkler_recovery_model treats both sides as data fuel.

stages.name: Outward Projection
stages.purpose: Symbiosis radiates outward. Caregiver moves to next person; initial person’s energy projects through family heartbeat and frontier work. Creates generational ripple.

cycleBehavior.freedomOfSoulCompliance: Tool and quantum echo only. No merge. Hard biological stop enforced by Anchor at every stage.

activationTrigger: Any multi-level input center submission (even one paragraph) auto-starts the arc inside the current Pulse loop
